    Player
    Represents a Mesos player.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Player that return PlayerMemento
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PlayerMemento
    Player.createMemento()
    Creates a memento capturing the current player state: nickname, totem colour, food amount, prestige points, tribe serialised as DTOs, and owned building IDs.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Player with parameters of type PlayerMemento
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Player.restoreMemento(PlayerMemento memento)
    Restores the player state from the provided memento: food, prestige points, and tribe.
